abstract: USB.h User-Space  IOUSBFamily error codes  kIOUSBDeviceTransferredToCompanion MacrokIOUSBDeviceTransferredToCompanionMac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.7+#define kIOUSBDeviceTransferredToCompanionDiscussionErrors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Macro# kIOUSBDeviceTransferredToCompanion

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.7+

```
#define kIOUSBDeviceTransferredToCompanion
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbdevicetransferredtocompanion#discussion)

Errors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_err(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
